name: npu-organize
title: NPU Organize
description: Organize files with on-device AI. Phase 1: rename screenshots using Windows Image Description (ImageDescriptionGenerator) + OCR.
author: user

commands.name: rename-new-screenshots
commands.title: Rename New Screenshots
commands.description: Scan the watched screenshots folder, describe each new image on-device, and rename it to a short hyphenated slug (optionally prefixed with the capture date).

commands.name: dry-run-screenshot-rename
commands.title: Dry Run Screenshot Rename
commands.description: Preview the proposed names for new screenshots without renaming any files.

preferences.name: watchFolder
preferences.title: Screenshots Folder
preferences.description: Folder to scan for new screenshots. Defaults to %UserProfile%\Pictures\Screenshots.

preferences.name: namingPattern
preferences.title: Naming Pattern
preferences.description: How renamed files are constructed. date-slug uses {YYYY-MM-DD}_{slug}.{ext} (matches notes). slug-only drops the date prefix.

preferences.name: fileExtensions
preferences.title: File Extensions
preferences.description: Comma-separated list of file extensions to rename (case-insensitive, leading dot optional).

preferences.name: skipAlreadyNamed
preferences.title: Skip Already-Named Files
preferences.description: Skip files whose name already starts with a YYYY-MM-DD_ prefix, to avoid infinite re-rename loops.
preferences.label: Skip files already in date_slug shape

preferences.name: maxFileSizeMb
preferences.title: Max File Size (MB)
preferences.description: Skip files larger than this (in megabytes) to protect the NPU. Empty = no limit.

preferences.name: maxSlugTokens
preferences.title: Max Slug Tokens
preferences.description: How many hyphen-separated words to keep in the slug. Recommended 3–5.

preferences.name: showSuccessToasts
preferences.title: Show Success Toasts
preferences.description: When enabled, shows a toast summary after the batch completes.
preferences.label: Show success notifications

preferences.name: ensureModelReady
preferences.title: Ensure AI Model Ready
preferences.description: When enabled, the bridge calls EnsureReadyAsync on ImageDescriptionGenerator before generating, avoiding 'NotReady' errors on first run.
preferences.label: Wait for AI model readiness
